creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-09 16:46:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/libopensync-plugin-syncml Makefile distinfo 
                                        pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The SyncML plugin is a plugin that allows OpenSync to be synchronized against
  SyncML capable devices. The plugin supports the protocol version 1.0, 1.1 and
  1.2. Available transports are http and obex. Bluetooth and HTTP-OBEX protocols
  are supported.
  
  WWW: http://www.opensync.org/wiki/syncml-guide
  
  PR:             ports/128628
  Submitted by:   Alex Samorukov <samm at os2.kiev.ua>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.343     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-syncml/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-syncml/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-syncml/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-syncml/pkg-plist (new)
